examples: This tool has a flat biting surface with a nubby rubber texture.
Boucle - a yarn with loops producing a rough, nubby appearance on woven or knitted fabrics.
If you do achieve it, you are expected to shroud your wealth in locally grown produce, understated luxury cars and nubby fabrics.
Those nubby rubber bristles also keep short coats shiny while gently massaging your pet's skin.
If that weren't enough, silk fabrics have been replaced by luxuriously textured, nubby blends such as cashmere and wool.
